deep_dive.title: TextGaze: Prompting Gaze Target Estimation with Textual Scene Cues
deep_dive.abstract: Gaze target estimation aims to infer the position of a person's gaze within a scene. Within mainstream design logic, multi-branch methods require extra supervision and annotations, while streamlined designs prioritize low-level visual saliency over true gaze intent. The former leads to a high annotation burden and hinders domain transfer, whereas the latter causes misalignment between predicted attention and actual gaze targets. To address this issue, we propose TextGaze, a unified cross-modal architecture that leverages a Large Vision-Language Model (LVLM) as scalable semantic guidance to balance the two design paradigms. The model extracts visual features from a frozen encoder and utilizes an LVLM to obtain gaze-aligned textual cues. We design a transformer-based fusion module with hierarchical text supervision to preserve task semantics. Lightweight decoding heads enable the joint prediction of gaze heatmaps and in-/out-of-frame status. We evaluate our method on four mainstream datasets, and the results show competitive performance across key metrics with robust cross-dataset generalisation without extra fine-tuning. Overall, we provide a streamlined alternative to traditional designs and highlight the potential of LVLMs as accessible auxiliary guidance for gaze estimation.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: gaze target estimation with textual cues for understanding human goals
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用文本线索进行注视目标估计以理解人类目标
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用文本线索进行注视目标估计以理解人类目标
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用文本线索进行注视目标估计以理解人类目标
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: TextGaze leverages LVLM as semantic guidance for gaze target estimation, aligning predicted attention with actual gaze intent to infer human goals.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 当前注视目标估计方法存在高标注负担或预测与真实意图错位的问题。本文提出TextGaze，一种统一跨模态架构，利用大型视觉语言模型作为可扩展语义引导，提取视觉特征并生成注视对齐的文本线索，通过变换器解码器预测注视目标。实验表明该方法在多个数据集上达到最先进性能，并为理解人类通过眼动表达的目标提供了计算模型。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 当前注视目标估计方法存在高标注负担或预测与真实意图错位的问题。本文提出TextGaze，一种统一跨模态架构，利用大型视觉语言模型作为可扩展语义引导，提取视觉特征并生成注视对齐的文本线索，通过变换器解码器预测注视目标。实验表明该方法在多个数据集上达到最先进性能，并为理解人类通过眼动表达的目标提供了计算模型。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: computational models for understanding human goals through eye movements

deep_dive.title: TDSal: Task-Based Top-Down Saliency Prediction Model
deep_dive.abstract: Visual saliency aims to predict the regions of an image most likely to attract human visual attention. While most saliency models assume free-viewing conditions, human attention is often shaped by explicit task goals. In this work, we address task-driven saliency prediction by proposing a model that conditions visual attention on natural-language task descriptions. The model produces task-dependent saliency maps that reflect how attention shifts under different viewing intents. Through quantitative and qualitative analysis, we show that incorporating explicit task semantics enables more faithful modeling of goal-directed visual attention.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: task-based saliency prediction model that conditions attention on natural language task descriptions
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 基于任务的自然语言描述调节注意力的显著性预测模型
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 基于任务的自然语言描述调节注意力的显著性预测模型
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 基于任务的自然语言描述调节注意力的显著性预测模型
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: TDSal predicts task-dependent saliency maps by conditioning visual attention on natural language task descriptions, enabling goal-directed attention modeling.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文提出TDSal模型，通过自然语言任务描述条件化视觉注意力，生成任务相关的显著性图。传统显著性模型假设自由观看，而TDSal显式建模目标驱动的注意力。实验表明，引入任务语义能更忠实地模拟目标导向的视觉注意。这为通过眼动理解人类意图提供了计算框架。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文提出TDSal模型，通过自然语言任务描述条件化视觉注意力，生成任务相关的显著性图。传统显著性模型假设自由观看，而TDSal显式建模目标驱动的注意力。实验表明，引入任务语义能更忠实地模拟目标导向的视觉注意。这为通过眼动理解人类意图提供了计算框架。
